title: Legio Cybernetica
specialty: Automaton warfare · command of Kastelan and battle-automata maniples
strength: Legion — hundreds of automata per Forge World
lore: The Legio Cybernetica is the Adeptus Mechanicus sub-order responsible for the creation, maintenance, and deployment of battle-automata — war robots of ancient design that have served the Mechanicus since before the Horus Heresy.

Cybernetica Datasmiths are the warrior-priests who accompany automata maniples into battle, reprogramming and repairing their charges mid-combat. They are recognisable by the large datastaves they carry, used to physically interface with robot cortex units.

The Legio Cybernetica is bound by the Compact of the Legio — strict prohibitions against creating true artificial intelligences that might echo the Men of Iron catastrophe. All battle-automata are deliberately limited, their intelligence constrained by hardcoded Cybernetica protocols that prevent independent thought.
